source: Original — Mörk Borg Module Runner scenario generator. Pairs with the canonical Adventure Seed tables in tables-gm.json.
site_types: A flooded crypt beneath a dead chapel
A frozen shrine to a forgotten saint
A gallows-hill with too many crows
A plague-house nailed shut from the outside
A toppled watchtower full of nests
site_atmospheres: Everything here is wet, and none of it is water.
The silence has weight, like a held breath.
Something has been waiting here longer than the stones have stood.
Cold light, no source. The shadows lean the wrong way.
The air tastes of old iron and new rot.
Birds will not land here. They know something.
twists: The one who hired you wanted you dead, not successful.
The relic you came for is the thing that is killing this place.
The dead here are not the enemy — they are a warning.
Your patron and the villain are the same person.
Completing the task is exactly what the apocalypse needs.
There is no treasure. There was never any treasure.
objectives: find the missing before the third bell
carry the truth back out alive
close the door that was opened
stop the rite before it finishes
climax_types: the final chamber that remembers everyone who entered
a throne of debt and bone
a flooded vault with one way out
a pit that has been waiting to be fed
hook_framing: finds you with no one else left to ask.
offers coin you both know is cursed.
does not ask so much as inform you.
is already dead when the message arrives, but the message remains.
side_site_types: A locked chapel-vault on a side road
A surveyor's abandoned tent, charts still pinned
A hermit's stilt-house over black water
A rust-eaten reliquary in the brush
A bone-pit somebody filled in too quickly
A cracked obelisk nobody can read
A burnt shepherd's hut with a fresh footprint
side_secrets: A scroll bears a list of names — one of yours is on it.
A bone-key carved with the same mark as a door you have not yet seen.
A coin minted by a kingdom that no longer exists; warm to the touch.
A child's drawing of the villain, drawn from life, recent.
A ledger of debts owed to the climax-warden, marked PAID IN MEAT.
A jar of teeth labelled in someone's careful hand: 'mine.'
climax_keys: the saint's finger-bone, scrimshawed with a sigil
the heretic's mask of stitched skin
the broken seal of the dead chapel
an unsigned writ of passage in old ink
the bone whistle that no living throat can sound
antechamber_themes: A warden's lobby of polished black stone
A sallyport stinking of rust and prayer
A cold vestibule lined with bound chronicles
A bell-room where the rope ends in a hand
An iron foreroom, walls scored by claws from inside
